conversion campaign that's optimized for registration is about 53 cents versus $37.37 for generating leads off Facebook but the next question is what's the quality like and actually I can I know already from some of the analysis we've had look at that if I then look at my top level KP eyes I'm actually getting sales generated already so it's still early into the testing but we already know that we are generating more sales from from leads that come through a lead form on the site versus a lead form on Facebook even though it's cheaper to get those leads from Facebook so you know this is just giving you an idea of setting up the KP eyes for your analysis but then how to use those together as well again you can have them all in one report but you know this way helps to break out the data and help you to focus on what's most important for you right now
